channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned scaffolding truck, 8th June
item.description:
This vehicle has been left here for 1 week and no attempt made by the scaffolding company to communicate, retrieve or repair the vehicle if it is broken down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hayes Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike dumping regular occurrence here, 8th June
item.description:
Some bikes have been on the ground for over a week and obstruct pathways I have lifted up and propped against a wall. This area needs investigation

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Point Close, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement, 8th June
item.description:
This is a regular occurrence at this spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Point Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Right at the end of Theobalds Road, the Eastbound direction in the the left hand lane, 8th June
item.description:
Right at the end of Theobalds Road there is a really poor bit of tarmac that is catching a lot of cyclists out. It's quite a large bump followed by a deep manhole cover, there isn't really any way to avoid it and you often find yourself surrounded by cyclists at speed with no way to avoid it. I've noticed a few people losing accessories having gone over it and it's a matter of time before it causes an injury, if not a few burst tires.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Theobalds Road, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House clearance, 8th June
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Point Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three lime bikes, 8th June
item.description:
These have been here OVER a week Please ask Lime bike to remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Point Hill, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large cardboard pieces west pavement and black bag rubbish by bike holder west side, 8th June
item.description:
Large cardboard west pavement and slightly further down lots rubbish west pavement and black rubbish bag by bike container edge of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box and gas cannisters by tree north pavement, 8th June
item.description:
Box and gas cannisters north pavement by tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surface, 8th June
item.description:
Road surface is dangerous for cyclists who have to swerve to avoid dangerous potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Leighton Grove, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses on side of road, 8th June
item.description:
Been , there only recently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Edenbridge Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two mattresses dumped, 8th June
item.description:
In there a couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Edenbridge Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Voi bike, 8th June
item.description:
Voi bike on footpath on estate - been there since at least 2nd June 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delawyk Crescent, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not collected and overflowing, 8th June
item.description:
Bins not collect and overglow on floor due to under size bin
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges in Mead Way need cutting, 8th June
item.description:
The grass verges in Mead Way are over-long and need cutting. Please would you arrange for them to be mown ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges in Farleigh Avenue need cutting, 8th June
item.description:
The grass verges in Farleigh Avenue are over-long and need cutting. Please would you arrange for them to be mown ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds growing in kerbs in Chilham Way, 8th June
item.description:
There are weeds growing in the kerbs in Chilham Way. Please would you arrange for the weeds to be sprayed with weed killer and the 'die back' removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Pembury Close, 8th June
item.description:
There is litter in Pembury Close in the kerbs and on the pavements. In addition, there is litter on the grassed areas next to the brick wall and on the grassed area just before the steps leading down to the shops. All this litter needs to be picked up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Chilham Way, 8th June
item.description:
There is litter in Chilham Way, specifically: 1. In the kerbs and on the pavements 2. On the grassed area outside the entrance to Budgens 3. In the square around the shops, especially around the benches All this litter needs to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Pembury Close, 8th June
item.description:
An inflatable pool has been dumped against the brick wall on the grassed area in Pembury Close (nearest house is 14c Pembury Close). A long wooden pole has also been dumped in the same patch of grass. Please would you ensure that both items are picked up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembury Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges in Boughton Avenue need cutting, 8th June
item.description:
The grass verges in Boughton Avenue are over-long and need cutting. Please would you arrange for them to be mown ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
